prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document specifically details the Right to Buy scheme and related housing statistics as administered by the Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government (MHCLG), which applies to England. The content discusses policies, data collection methods, and legislation relevant to English local authorities and does not extend to the devolved administrations of Wales, Scotland, or Northern Ireland.
